commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Hethites, the most formidable of the nations of Chanaan. (Masius)

commentaries.author: Gregory the Theologian
commentaries.content: What is the special excellence of Joshua? His generalship, and the distribution of the inheritance, and the taking possession of the Holy Land. - "On Basil the Great, Oration 43.72"
